name: compact-mcp-core
description: React AST compression engine and MCP server for Claude Code. Gives Claude deep React intelligence via live Babel AST analysis — maps component trees, traces dependency chains, extracts raw function source.

scripts.publish:mcp: npm run build:mcp && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path'); function cpDir(s,d){fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});for(const f of fs.readdirSync(s)){const ss=path.join(s,f),dd=path.join(d,f);fs.statSync(ss).isDirectory()?cpDir(ss,dd):fs.copyFileSync(ss,dd)}} cpDir('dist','compact-mcp-publish/dist'); fs.copyFileSync('README.md','compact-mcp-publish/README.md')" && cd compact-mcp-publish && npm publish --access public
